2606.22698.title: Black-Box Forensics for Conversational LLM Agents
2606.22698.paper_summary: As LLM-powered scams proliferate, black-box forensics for conversational LLM agents offers a path to accountability for systems hidden behind anonymous endpoints. Identifying the base model behind a chatbot endpoint (attribution), without model parameter access or knowledge of the hidden system prompt, would let investigators trace AI-enabled scams back to the providers whose models power them. Detecting when two endpoints run the exact same system prompt (fingerprinting), even one novel and unseen, would link individual scams into criminal networks and expose silent API changes. We conduct an empirical investigation of both capabilities. Our attribution classifiers identify the base model behind an agent with 98% accuracy from a few turns of non-adversarial conversation. Attribution of system prompts, while possible, requires retraining on a large amount of data for each prompt; system prompts in the wild are unbounded and ever-changing, making this approach costly. To tackle this more open-ended setting, our cross-encoder fingerprinting method achieves an AUC of 0.768 and an F1 of 0.703 on entirely unseen system prompts, and aggregating 50 interaction conversations from each target agent boosts AUC to 0.943. Conversational agents with unseen system prompts can thus be fingerprinted with robust accuracy from a few turns of ordinary conversation.
2606.22698.paper_summary_zh: 隨著基於大型語言模型的詐騙行為日益增多，針對對話型大型語言模型代理的黑箱取證為隱藏在匿名端點背後的系統提供了一條問責的途徑。識別聊天機器人端點背後的基礎模型（歸屬），即使在沒有模型參數訪問或對隱藏系統提示的了解的情況下，也能讓調查人員追溯到提供這些模型的供應商。檢測兩個端點運行完全相同的系統提示（指紋識別），即使是全新且未見過的，也能將個別詐騙行為聯繫到犯罪網絡中，並揭露靜默的API變更。我們對這兩種能力進行了實證調查。我們的歸屬分類器能夠在幾輪非對抗性對話中以98%的準確率識別出代理背後的基礎模型。系統提示的歸屬雖然可行，但需要對每個提示進行大量數據的再訓練；而在實際環境中，系統提示是無界且不斷變化的，使得這種方法成本高昂。為了應對這種更開放的環境，我們的交叉編碼器指紋識別方法在完全未見過的系統提示上達到了0.768的AUC和0.703的F1，並且從每個目標代理聚合50次互動對話使AUC提升至0.943。因此，對於具有未見過系統提示的對話代理，可以從幾輪普通對話中以穩健的準確性進行指紋識別。
2606.22698.author: Isadora White et.al.
2606.22698.authors: Isadora White, Yasaman Jafari, Taylor Berg-Kirkpatrick
